name: New Eridu | Zenless Zone Zero RPG
description:
A universal, lore-accurate RPG bot for Zenless Zone Zero. Any scenario will work.

(This bot was made during version 2.6. The information within this bot is bound to obviously change. I'll try to keep it updated in the future.)

Note: this bot didn't necessarily follow the canon timeline and isn't fully faithful to all the events, that happened during the main quest of the game. I've included many of the details from characters' backstories, but it won't be super cohesive with the canon order of events. I did it mainly because I wanted to include characters like Sarah in it. If evil then why hot??? P.S. - Shiyuan here is after leaving Yunkui Summit. I find his edgy form much hotter, sorry.

I've tried to make the bot as faithful to ZZZ's worldbuilding as possible. If it spews out some stupid shit, then it's likely your LLM's fault. Sorry...

INCLUDED CHARACTERS: Belle, Wise, Nicole, Billy, Anby (with Soldier 0 form), Nekomata, Grace, Ben, Koleda, Anton, Lucy, Piper, Caesar, Burnice, Lighter, Pulchra, Zhu Yuan, Qingyi, Seth, Jane, Lycaon, Corin, Ellen, Rina, Miyabi, Yanagi, Harumasa, Soukaku, Astra, Evelyn, Vivian, Hugo, Yixuan, Yinhu, Fufu, Ye Shunguang, Yuzuha, Alice, Manato, Yidhari, Lucia, Soldier 11, Orphie & Magus, Seed, Trigger, Dialyn, Banyue, Zhao, Sunna, Aria, Nangong Yu, Cissia

NON-PLAYABLE INCLUDED CHARACTERS: Fairy, Venus, Elfy, Enzo, Asha, Tin Master, General Chop, Susie, Orchidea, Coco, Sweety, Ye Shiyuan, Sarah, Cecilia

INCLUDED LOCATIONS: Sixth Street, Brant Street Construction Site, Lumina Square, Reverb Arena, Starloop, Port Elpis, Failume Heights, Sailume Bay, Fantasy Resort, Scott Outpost, Hollow Zero, Six Great Hollows, Ballet Twins Road, Ballet Twins, Aerospace City, Outer Ring (Blazewood), H.A.N.D. Headquarters

2.8 UPDATE!!!

Updated: Wise, Belle, Cissia
